title: ornithogalum wiedemannii var. reflexum
intro: Ornithogalum wiedemannii var. reflexum, also known as the White Calla Lily or Wild Hyacinth, is a bulbous perennial plant species native to the Eastern Cape Province in South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the bulbs are typically dried and used in teas or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
